//: LSP code-intelligence for this no-build JS project: reliable cross-file go-to-definition, find-references, rename and hover, plus correct ES-module/DOM resolution. checkJs is OFF by default because Kaplay ships no types and the code is dynamically shaped, so full type-checking infers false mismatches from the minified engine. To opt into stricter diagnostics later, set checkJs:true and add Kaplay typings/JSDoc — the non-standard globals are already declared in types/globals.d.ts.
